The '''Huxlings''' were a group [[Smuggler/Legends|smugglers]] who worked for [[Jerf Huxley]]<ref name="Survivor's Quest" /> as of [[22 ABY/Legends|22 ABY]].<ref name="TERC">''[[The Essential Reader's Companion]]''</ref> By that [[Standard year/Legends|year]] the group had worked exclusively with [[Talon Karrde]] for the last [[Standard decade/Legends|decade]], but Karrde ended [[Gender/Legends|his]] working relationship with them when he chose to become a more legitimate businessman. When [[Mara Jade Skywalker]] delivered this news to Huxley, he and twenty Huxlings—including [[Bats]], [[Fisk]] and [[Sinker (smuggler)|Sinker]]—confronted Jade Skywalker in an attempt to extract a large severance payment from Karrde.<ref name="Survivor's Quest" />

==Behind the scenes==
Sinker first appeared in the [[2004]] ''[[Star Wars]]'' novel ''[[Survivor's Quest]]'' written by [[Timothy Zahn]].<ref name="Survivor's Quest" />

==Appearances==
*''[[Survivor's Quest]]'' {{Ab|Survivor's Quest (unabridged audiobook)}} {{1st|in book}}
